html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Fulcronial Selector can be used to activate W.A.R.B.O.T.. Its base appears in the center of Hermit Island after moving the Crabby Hermit away from the island, but its lever will only be available after player gives an encapsulated Celestial Revenant to Grainy Transmission (first time summon) or W.A.R.B.O.T..

Once pulled, the W.A.R.B.O.T. will activate and then turn into Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.. At the same time, Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinators activates and creates a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Fulcronial Selector
On
Off
Miscellaneous
"wagpunk_lever"
“It's a good time to switch things up.”
–Wilson
“Let's flip it already.”
–Willow
“What does it do? Wolfgang just curious.”
–Wolfgang
“Let's pull it come what may.”
–Wendy
“ACTIVATE!”
–WX-78
“A standard two-position activation switch.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lever, Lucy. I said it's a great lever. Sheesh.”
–Woodie
“No good will come of this!”
–Maxwell
“A warriör trusts nöt cursed töggles.”
–Wigfrid
“It's our turn to pull it!”
–Webber
“What appliance is this for?”
–Warly
“Danger?”
–Wormwood
“What could go wrong?”
–Winona
“Is it polite to pull it?”
–Wortox
“Florp! Me pull!”
–Wurt
“Maybe we'll skip the instructions just this once.”
–Walter
“I know what this does...”
–Wanda
The Fulcronial Selector can be used to activate W.A.R.B.O.T.. Its base appears in the center of Hermit Island after moving the Crabby Hermit away from the island, but its lever will only be available after player gives an encapsulated Celestial Revenant to Grainy Transmission (first time summon) or W.A.R.B.O.T..
Once pulled, the W.A.R.B.O.T. will activate and then turn into Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.. At the same time, Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinators activates and creates a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass.

title: Fulcronial Selector

The '''Fulcronial Selector''' can be used to activate [[W.A.R.B.O.T.]]. Its base appears in the center of [[Hermit Island]] after moving the [[Crabby Hermit]] away from the island, but its lever will only be available after player gives an [[Phasmo-Encapsulator|encapsulated]] [[Celestial Revenant]] to [[Grainy Transmission]] (first time summon) or W.A.R.B.O.T..

Once pulled, the W.A.R.B.O.T. will activate and then turn into [[Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.]]. At the same time, [[Kinetoclasmic Field Expandinator]]s activates and creates a barrier that players on the inside cannot pass.

{{clear}}
